scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=server" "VITE_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:3001 npm run dev --workspace=client"
scripts.dev:network: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=server" "VITE_SERVER_URL=http://192.168.1.219:3001 npm run dev --workspace=client"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=client && npm run build --workspace=server
